label: Flow2: 完成递增
info: webhook接收训练完成 → 完成率计算 → 渐进超负荷规则 → 生成LOCKED提案 → 写入SQLite

name: 解析请求体
渐进超负荷计算
保存提案到DB
sql: INSERT INTO proposals (type, lock_state, target_table, target_id, target_field, old_value, new_value, reason, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

name: 更新连续记录
sql: UPDATE streaks SET current_count = current_count + 1, longest_count = CASE WHEN current_count + 1 > longest_count THEN current_count + 1 ELSE longest_count END, last_date = date('now') WHERE unit_id = (SELECT unit_id FROM schedule_entries WHERE entry_id = ?)
